name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR41UseChemo
title: Use neoadjuvant chemotherapy when the chemotherapy decision does not require surgical data
description: Choose chemotherapy or endocrine downstaging approach for HR-positive HER2-negative disease.

action.description: Neoadjuvant chemotherapy can substitute for adjuvant chemotherapy in HR-positive HER2-negative disease when surgical pathology or genomic testing is not required for the decision.

documentation.citation: Neoadjuvant chemotherapy can be used in HR-positive HER2-negative disease when the chemotherapy decision can be made without surgical pathology or genomic testing. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 4.1
documentation.label: claim-r4-1

action.title: Use neoadjuvant chemotherapy when the chemotherapy decision does not require surgical data
